card.initiative: UGC creator network → LLM citation + brand search lift
card.budget: Q2 ~$20K (15 creators × 3 videos = 45 videos, same PO covers boosting)
card.situation: Singapore's H2 strategy = quality customers, not volume. Joshua running a UGC-heavy KOL playbook on Instagram + LinkedIn (ICP = business owners / CFOs, not Gen Z, so TikTok deprioritized). Q1 results: 12 KOLs / 15-18 videos / ~1K avg organic views / 2.5% avg engagement rate. Best performer: Josh Chan ($20M e-com exit, business-coach community), 3.2% engagement across 3 videos (1688, SWIFT vs local transfers, the card). Joshua's UGC thesis: brand search volume correlates ~33% with AI citations (vs traditional backlinks), so multi-voice UGC > single mega-KOL for LLM ranking. Steven aligned: YouTube + Meta dominant for AI citation. Q1 spend with boosting >$500K impressions; Q2 target >1M with boosting included. Q2 plan slipping to July; agency continues.
asks: Boost Josh Chan videos on Meta — Joshua to send Collab Invite to brand account. Priority: local transfers + card video over 1688. Verify partnership setup, then run from central budget.
Co-author the UGC playbook with Joshua to replicate across regions
next: Joshua sends Meta partnership for Josh Chan video boosting
Steven sets up boost from central budget once Collab Invite lands
Joshua starts Q2 UGC round with agency, 15 creators
benchmarks: UGC unit cost: $1K-$1.2K per creator × 3 videos
Q1 spend with boosting: >$500K impressions Singapore region

extended.icp: Business owners / CFOs (not Gen Z), so IG + LinkedIn primary, TikTok deprioritized
